title: OC 152 Revised timelines on Changes in UPI raw file
text:
NPCI/UPI/202 2-23/OC.152       30th June , 202 2 
 
To, 
 
All Member Banks, Unified Payments Interface (UPI)  
 
Madam / Dear Sir,  
 
Subject: Revised timelines on c hanges in UPI raw data file  – OC 121 . 
 
We refer to Operating Circular (OC) No. 121 dated 25th October, 2021  on changes in UPI raw 
data files wherein, we have requested UPI members to complied with necessary changes by 30th 
June, 2022.  
 
It is understood from various banks that necessary changes mentioned in OC 121 are  still under 
development to handle the reconciliation based on revised raw data files.  NPCI has also arranging 
necessary support for banks for smooth migration of changes from old raw data format to new 
format.  
 
In view thereof, we wish to inform you that the timelines to fulfil the  OC 121 compliance is 
extended to 3 more months hence a ll Banks are requested to complied with these changes by 
30th September , 2022.  
 
Please make note of the above and disseminate the instructions contained herein to the officials 
concerned.  
 
For any quer ies or clarification, please contact:  
Name  Email Id  
Sonam Kandu  sonam.kandu@npci.org.in  
Sapna Gupta  sapna.gupta@npci.org.in  
Pankaj Samarth  pankaj.samarth@npci.org.in  
 
 
Yours faithfully,  
 
 
 
Saiprasad Nabar  
Chief – Online Product Operations  
 
ENCL:  OC 121
